items.english: Today the weather is nice.
Today the weather is hot.
Today the weather is cold.
Today it is sunny.
Today it is cloudy.
Today it is raining.
Today it is very windy.
Today it is a little windy.
It is very hot.
It is cold.
What is the weather like today?
Today is better than yesterday.
Yesterday it was rainy.
Tomorrow it may rain.
Tomorrow it may be sunny.
In summer the weather is hot.
In winter the weather is cold.
I like the weather in spring.
In autumn it rains more.
Today the sea is nice.
Today is not a good day for the sea.
If it is hot, I go swimming.
If it is cold, I stay at home.
If it rains, I take an umbrella.

items.maltese: Jekk ikun sħun, nilbes flokk ħafif.
items.english: If it is hot, I wear a light shirt.
If it is cold, I wear a jacket.

items.maltese: Jekk ikun riħ, ma mmurx bir-rota.
items.english: If it is windy, I do not go by bicycle.
If it is nice, I go for a walk.

items.maltese: Jekk ikun sħun, nixrob ħafna ilma.
items.english: If it is hot, I drink a lot of water.
I like sunny weather.
I do not like cold weather.
I do not like when it rains.
The wind is strong today.
The sun is strong today.
The weather changed quickly.
In the morning it was cold.
At noon it was hot.
In the evening it was cool.
Now the weather is better.
Before it was hotter.

items.maltese: Illum hemm aktar xemx minn ilbieraħ.
items.english: Today there is more sun than yesterday.
Today there is less wind.

items.maltese: Issa se noħroġ għax it-temp sabiħ.
items.english: Now I will go out because the weather is nice.

items.maltese: Aħna se mmorru l-baħar jekk ikun xemxi.
items.english: We will go to the sea if it is sunny.

items.maltese: Aħna se nibqgħu d-dar jekk tagħmel xita.
items.english: We will stay at home if it rains.
I would like nice weather for the weekend.
Last weekend was sunny.
This month the weather was good.

items.maltese: Nispera li għada ma tagħmilx xita.
items.english: I hope it does not rain tomorrow.

items.maltese: Illum huwa jum sabiħ għal mixja.
items.english: Today is a nice day for a walk.
